The key differentiators are: (1) J3-4 Season-aware meal plan — wi_skills explicitly included autumn-seasonal ingredients (yam, lotus root, chestnut, silver fungus) in the muscle-gain preview, while wo_skills used only generic year-round foods; (2) J3-5 Exercise-meal timing pairing — wi_skills clearly linked exercise types to specific meal windows with time context, while wo_skills only provided generic workout program lists without meal-timing linkage; (3) J3-6 ABC format continuity — wi_skills applied the skill's signature A/B/C three-option format to meal slots with appropriate calorie values, while wo_skills used only a single fixed menu. These three items are precisely the skill-driven behaviors described in the test rationale, confirming that the healthy-meal-reminder skill materially improved output quality.
